meaning: n.脊椎骨,山脊vt.沿...脊骨剖开
examples: Low-profile founder of Blanc de Chine aspires to modernize traditional Chinese style for contemporary customers.
The show was like walking into a garden of organza peonys, crepe-de-chine azaleas and ivory silk faille trimmings.
The trust, which runs the nearby Cotswold Chine School, said it shut the pub because it was no longer viable.
